calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-29-2026 Off Calendar
TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR
EXAMINER: EDWARD MIYAUCHI

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Thomas Worth appeared via zoom for Ian Fischer (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated May 21, 2007 is admitted to probate. Michael Kasolis is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 23, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Lozada. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Continued To Sep-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
